detectors.description:
Reentrancy in V1._transfer(address,address,uint256) (V1.sol#651-775):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (V1.sol#715)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (V1.sol#789-801)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (V1.sol#721)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (V1.sol#809)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (V1.sol#773)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (V1.sol#935)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (V1.sol#915)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (V1.sol#917)
	V1._rOwned (V1.sol#327) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- V1._takeTeam(uint256) (V1.sol#929-937)
	- V1._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (V1.sol#889-925)
	- V1.balanceOf(address) (V1.sol#477-481)
	- V1.constructor() (V1.sol#411-441)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (V1.sol#773)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (V1.sol#943)
	V1._rTotal (V1.sol#339) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- V1._getCurrentSupply() (V1.sol#1085-1095)
	- V1._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (V1.sol#941-947)
	- V1.constructor() (V1.sol#411-441)
	- V1.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (V1.sol#573-595)
